title: Accenture India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Accenture India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
